info.title: Helix Commerce API
info.description: Catalog, configuration, orders, and auth API for the Helix Product Bus.

tags.name: Config
tags.description: Per-site configuration: allowed origins, delivery sites, auth toggle, and reCAPTCHA settings. One config document per org/site.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Retrieve, create/replace, or delete a product by path. The literal path `/*` selects bulk mode: POST an array of products (max 50 per request).

tags.name: Indices
tags.description: Create or delete a query index identified by a path ending in `/index.json`. Creating an index queues existing products under that path for indexing.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Merge-patch the order custom data map. Each key/value is capped at 2048 characters; a null value removes the property.

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Initiate a payment for an order. Entry point for starting a payment flow — the client picks a provider/payment method and supplies an idempotency key. Guest checkout is supported (no auth required).

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: A single address or order belonging to a customer.

tags.name: Estimate
tags.description: Computes a cart estimate. `estimateType` selects the calculation: `tax` (tax rate for an address), `shipping` (available shipping rates), `price` (promotions + coupon + auto-rule discounts), or `order` (per-method totals including tax and shipping). No authentication required.

tags.name: Places
tags.description: Origin-gated proxy to Google Places (New) and the Address Validation API. `action` selects the operation: `autocomplete`, `details`, or `validate`. Access is allowed only for requests whose Origin matches the site config.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Clears the `auth_token` cookie and revokes the token if a valid one is presented (via cookie or bearer header). Always responds 204, even when no/invalid token is presented.

get.description: Returns the stored configuration document for the org/site.

404.description: No configuration exists for this org/site.

post.description: Validates and stores the configuration document, replacing any existing one.

requestBody.description: The full configuration document to store.

delete.description: Removes the configuration document for the org/site.

get.description: Returns a page of product summaries (sku, name, path). Pass a `cursor` (from a prior truncated response) to page through results.

schema.description: A page of catalog product summaries.

truncated.description: Whether more results are available beyond this page.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; present only when truncated.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Product path (e.g. `/us/en/products/blender-pro-500.json`), or the literal `*` for bulk writes.

get.description: Returns the stored ProductBus entry for the given path.

post.description: Only valid at the literal `/*` path. Accepts an array of products (max 50); each is validated against the ProductBus schema and written. Unchanged products are skipped (reported with status 200).

schema.description: Write result. `product` is set for single-item writes, `products` for bulk writes.

product.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

400.description: Invalid request: not an array, too many products, missing path, or invalid product.

405.description: Method not allowed at this path.

requestBody.description: Array of products to upsert. Each entry must include `path`.

put.description: Validates the product against the ProductBus schema and writes it. The `path` in the body, if present, must match the URL path.

schema.description: Write result. `product` is set for single-item writes, `products` for bulk writes.

product.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

400.description: Validation failure or body/URL path mismatch.

delete.description: Deletes the product at the given path. The literal `/*` path is rejected.

items.description: Outcome of a single product write or delete.

400.description: Wildcard delete attempted, or malformed path.

get.description: Returns the registry of query indices, each with its last-modified timestamp.

schema.description: The registry of query indices for a site.

lastModified.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last modification.

post.description: Creates a query index for the given path. The index path is the directory portion of the URL (the trailing `/index.json` is stripped). No request body.

400.description: Path is missing, does not end with `/index.json`, or is otherwise invalid.

409.description: Index already exists, or the registry was modified concurrently.

502.description: Registry or index storage update failed.

delete.description: Deletes the query index for the given path and removes it from the registry.

400.description: Path is missing or does not end with `/index.json`.

404.description: No index exists at the given path.

get.description: Returns orders for the org/site, optionally filtered by creation time range and state. Admin-only.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token. `Bearer <jwt>`. Must carry the `admin` role.

403.description: Caller lacks the orders:read permission, the admin role, or org/site mismatch.

post.description: Validates the order, verifies item prices/countries (or a signed estimateToken locking in tax/shipping/discounts), creates the customer if needed, and persists the order. reCAPTCHA-gated for unauthenticated callers.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token. `Bearer <jwt>`. Optional — guest checkout is supported.

parameters.name: X-Recaptcha-Token
parameters.description: reCAPTCHA Enterprise token; required for unauthenticated callers.

200.description: The created order, wrapped as `{ order }`.

400.description: The order failed schema validation, or the estimateToken was invalid/expired/mismatched.

403.description: Authenticated caller lacks orders:write, has an org/site mismatch, or email mismatch.

422.description: An unauthorized free ($0) item was requested beyond the estimate token grant.

get.description: Returns the order. Non-admin/non-service callers may only read their own order (matched on customer email).

403.description: Caller lacks orders:read, org/site mismatch, or email mismatch.

404.description: No order with this id (visible to the caller).

403.description: Caller lacks orders:write or has an org/site mismatch.

post.description: Computes tax, shipping, and discounts for the cart against the selected shipping method and returns a signed estimateToken. reCAPTCHA-gated for unauthenticated callers.

parameters.name: X-Recaptcha-Token
parameters.description: reCAPTCHA Enterprise token; required for unauthenticated callers.

200.description: The estimate: subtotal, tax, shipping method, discounts, total, lineItems, and a signed estimateToken.

400.description: The preview body failed validation, shippingMethod.id is missing, or the selected method is unavailable.

422.description: An unauthorized free ($0) item was requested with no matching free-item grant.

requestBody.description: The cart to estimate. `shippingMethod.id` is required.

patch.description: Merges the request body into the order custom data. Keys with a null value are removed. Each key and value is limited to 2048 characters.

200.description: The updated order, wrapped as `{ order }`.

400.description: The custom data failed validation (non-object, non-string value, or over the 2048-char limit).

errors.message: custom data must be an object

403.description: Caller lacks orders:write/orders:custom:write or has an org/site mismatch.

requestBody.description: A flat map of custom keys to string values (or null to delete).

post.description: Validates the request, looks up the payment provider, enforces the pending order-state guard (with idempotent replay), and delegates to the provider. Returns the provider result (synchronous charge outcome or a requires_action redirect). No authentication required.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer token. `Bearer <jwt>`. Optional — guest checkout is supported.

200.description: The provider result (terminal charge outcome or a requires_action redirect).

400.description: Missing required body field, unknown provider, or provider-specific input validation failure.

422.description: Order not payable (not pending), provider not configured, max attempts exceeded, or provider rejection.

502.description: The payment provider returned an upstream error.

503.description: Attempt persistence failed after retries for a redirect provider; retry with the same idempotencyKey.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation request. `provider`, `paymentMethod`, and `idempotencyKey` are required; `fraudToken` is the optional fraud SDK session token.

provider.description: Registered provider name (e.g. chase, chase-wallet, paypal, paypal-express, affirm).

idempotencyKey.description: Caller-supplied idempotency key; replays return the prior result.

fraudToken.description: Optional fraud-provider JS SDK session token.

get.description: Returns customers for the org/site. Paginated via an opaque `cursor` when the R2 page is truncated.

200.description: The list of customers (and an optional pagination cursor).

post.description: Validates and stores a new customer. Often called unauthenticated during checkout.

409.description: A customer with this email already exists.

get.description: Returns the customer. Requires ownership of the email and membership of the org/site (no `customers:read` permission).

404.description: No customer exists for this email.

delete.description: Removes the customer. Admin role required.

404.description: No email supplied in the path.

get.description: Lists the customer's addresses (`subroute=addresses`) or orders (`subroute=orders`). Listing orders requires `orders:read`; both require ownership of the email.

200.description: The list of addresses or orders.

post.description: Creates an address for the customer (`subroute=addresses` only). Requires ownership of the email.

get.description: Retrieves a single address (requires ownership of the email) or a single order. Order lookup is intentionally unauthenticated — knowing email + orderId is treated as sufficient proof for guest order-status lookups.

404.description: No such address or order for this customer.

delete.description: Deletes a single address (`subroute=addresses`). Requires ownership of the email.

404.description: No such address for this customer.

501.description: Updating an address (POST with a resourceId) is not implemented.

post.description: Request shape depends on `estimateType`. All variants accept a partial shipping address and (for price/shipping/order) a cart `items` array and optional `couponCode`.

200.description: The computed estimate. Body shape varies by `estimateType`.

400.description: The request failed schema validation or `country` could not be resolved.

requestBody.description: Estimate request. Shape varies by `estimateType`; see route description.

get.description: For `autocomplete`, provide `input` (and optional `sessiontoken`, `regioncode`). For `details`, provide `place_id` (and optional `sessiontoken`). The proxied Google response is returned verbatim.

200.description: The proxied Google Places response (passed through verbatim).

403.description: Request Origin is missing or not in the site's allowed origins.

500.description: The Google Places API key is not configured.

502.description: The upstream Google API failed or was unreachable.

post.description: Same actions as GET, plus `validate`: provide `address.addressLines` (non-empty array) and optional `address.regionCode`. Returns a normalized verdict envelope.

200.description: For `validate`, a normalized envelope (`action`, `formattedAddress`, `addressComponents`, `uspsDeliverable`). For `autocomplete`/`details`, the proxied Google response.

400.description: A required field was missing or invalid (e.g. empty `address.addressLines`).

403.description: Request Origin is missing or not in the site's allowed origins.

500.description: The Google Places API key is not configured.

502.description: The upstream Google API failed or was unreachable.

requestBody.description: Request body. Shape varies by `action`; see operation description.

200.description: OTP challenge; pass these values to /auth/callback.

schema.description: Opaque OTP challenge — echo `email`, `hash` and `exp` back to the callback.

hash.description: HMAC of the issued code; must be returned to /callback.

exp.description: Expiry timestamp (ms epoch) of the OTP code.

401.description: Auth is not enabled for this org/site.

requestBody.description: Email to send the OTP code to, plus optional locale hints.

schema.description: OTP login request. Hand-validated by the handler (no runtime schema).

email.description: Email address to send the OTP code to.

post.summary: Verify an OTP code and obtain a session token

200.description: Authenticated; JWT issued in body and `auth_token` cookie.

Set-Cookie.description: auth_token=<jwt>; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Path=/; Max-Age=86400

schema.description: Issued JWT plus resolved identity. Token is also set as the `auth_token` cookie.

400.description: Missing/invalid email, code, hash, or exp.

401.description: Invalid/expired/used code, or rate limit exceeded.

500.description: Server misconfigured or internal error creating the token.

requestBody.description: The code plus the challenge values returned by /auth/login.

schema.description: OTP verification request. Hand-validated by the handler (no runtime schema).

code.description: The OTP code the user received by email.

post.summary: Log out and clear the session cookie

Set-Cookie.description: auth_token=; Max-Age=0; Path=/; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

price.description: Price information for a product or variant.

final.description: Final price the customer pays, as a decimal string (e.g. "19.99").

regular.description: Original price before any discount, as a decimal string.

ErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope returned for non-2xx responses.

code.description: Machine-readable error code (also sent as the `x-error-code` header).

message.description: Human-readable error message (also sent as the `x-error` header).

resource.description: The resource type involved, when applicable.

retryable.description: Whether the caller may retry the request.

ValidationErrorResponse.description: Error envelope returned when the request body fails schema validation.

path.description: JSON path to the offending value, e.g. `$.allowedOrigins[0]`.

message.description: What was wrong at this path.
